message:
refactor(test): migrate 6 external test files from direct tokio to runtime_compat

Replaces tokio::runtime::Runtime/Builder usage in external test files:
- proptest_pool.rs: 16 Runtime::new() → RuntimeBuilder::multi_thread()
- proptest_snapshot.rs: 9 Runtime::new() → RuntimeBuilder::multi_thread()
- alert_monitor_tests.rs: Builder → RuntimeBuilder::current_thread()
- event_annotation_tests.rs: Builder → RuntimeBuilder::current_thread()
- notification_history_tests.rs: Builder → RuntimeBuilder::current_thread()
- usage_metrics_tests.rs: Builder → RuntimeBuilder::current_thread()

Total: 30 callsites migrated across 6 files.
All tests pass (12,950 lib + 105 external).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
